message:
docs: update FEATURE_PARITY.md to reflect implemented features, sync issue tracker

FEATURE_PARITY.md:
- Decimal precision/scale: workaround → complete (max_digits/decimal_places attrs)
- Regex pattern validation: partial → complete
- Migration tracking: basic → implemented
- Auto-generate migrations: excluded → implemented (schema_diff + MigrationWriter)
- Remove "Explicitly Excluded" section — all previously excluded features are now
  implemented: lazy loading, unit of work, identity map, generic models, computed
  fields, migration generation
- Update conclusion to reference bd-162 for remaining parity work

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- bd-182o (SQLite DropColumn fallback): open → in_progress
- bd-3j44 (cascade delete): minor metadata update

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
